feat.name: Vigil's Palisades
feat.text: When you use Persistent Creation, you can create up to three special wooden shields that provide a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and have Hardness 15, 120 HP, and BT 60. A creature that Raises a Shield made with your Persistent Creation also gains a +2 item bonus to saving throws while the shield is raised.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
